pages.text: The $(l)Oathbound Relic$() is the heart of the mod. Equipping it marks the bearer as $(l:glossary/remnant_terms#branded)Branded$(), awakens Oathbound systems, and opens the path to stronger curios, remnants, and eventually the sin weapons.$(br2)Power is never free in this mod. The Relic gives blessings, but it also imposes curses that define the entire tone of progression.
$(li)Binds permanently once equipped$(li)Persists through death$(li)Awakens bound relics and Titan's Remnants$(li)Acts as the gateway to late-game forging
pages.title: The Covenant

pages.text: $(l)Default curses$()$(br)$(li)Frailty: you take extra incoming damage$(li)Provocation: nearby neutral creatures become hostile$(li)Shattered Plate: armor is less effective$(li)Blood Toll: Violence draws a blood price from the bearer, but only once each short interval$(li)Living Ember: fire clings longer$(li)Soul Fracture: respawning leaves part of the soul behind$(li)Wakeful Doom: sleep offers no refuge

$(l)Default blessings$()$(br)$(li)Bonus Looting$(li)Bonus Fortune$(li)Much higher XP from kills$(li)Higher enchanting power near tables$(li)Bonus attack speed$(li)Emergency Absorption at low health$(br2)These values are based on your config defaults. If you rebalance the config later, update this page to match.
